description: Removes a Resource Planning Tag from being available to a given group or groups

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

parameters.name: group_ids
parameters.description: Array of UUIDs for which Groups this Tag should be available to or be removed from depending on context. For adding availability, if globally_accessible is true, this can be an empty array.

items.description: Response schema containing a list of Group IDs.

group_ids.description: Array of unique identifiers for Groups.
